strengths: 19+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, exceeding the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform running on Kubernetes and used in production by Green Map
Recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) plus strong knowledge-sharing history through workshops and conference talks
concerns: Career has been at Senior/Staff IC level; no evidence of Director-level scope, org-wide technical strategy, or influence across large engineering organizations
AI experience is recent and tooling-focused — no recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products at scale, or ML/research depth the role prefers
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, and cloud experience (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) appears applied rather than platform-strategy level

key_factors.factor: Depth and recognition of AI expertise
Experience length and entrepreneurial builder background

response.justification: The candidate comfortably clears the experience-length minimum and shows genuine builder fluency, startup founding experience, and recent agentic-AI tooling work that aligns with the role's direction. However, this is a Director-level IC role centered on AI strategy, customer advisory, and organization-wide influence, and the resume reflects strong hands-on senior engineering rather than principal-level strategic leadership or recognized AI thought leadership. The gap between demonstrated scope and the role's expectations is significant, though the trajectory and breadth make a conversation defensible if the pipeline is thin.
